query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workflowApprovalQueue` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `runId` INT NOT NULL,
  `approvalType` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `monetaryValue` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD',
  `contextData` JSON,
  `aiRecommendation` TEXT,
  `aiConfidence` DECIMAL(3,2),
  `riskAssessment` TEXT,
  `relatedEntityType` VARCHAR(50),
  `relatedEntityId` INT,
  `status` ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'escalated', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `assignedToRoles` JSON,
  `assignedToUsers` JSON,
  `currentAssignee` INT,
  `requestedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `dueAt` TIMESTAMP,
  `escalateAt` TIMESTAMP,
  `escalatedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `escalationLevel` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `resolvedBy` INT,
  `resolvedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `resolutionNotes` TEXT,
  `wasAutoApproved` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `autoApprovalReason` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3WiXecng1chg6se.408a3c215e81 --database 3o4cnYLmRMvo8cxB6kVVJ3 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workflowApprovalQueue` (

  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `monetaryValue` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD',
  `contextData` JSON,
  `aiRecommendation` TEXT,
  `aiConfidence` DECIMAL(3,2),
  `riskAssessment` TEXT,
  `relatedEntityType` VARCHAR(50),
  `relatedEntityId` INT,
  `status` ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'escalated', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `assignedToRoles` JSON,
  `assignedToUsers` JSON,
  `currentAssignee` INT,
  `requestedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `dueAt` TIMESTAMP,
  `escalateAt` TIMESTAMP,
  `escalatedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `escalationLevel` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `resolvedBy` INT,
  `resolvedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `resolutionNotes` TEXT,
  `wasAutoApproved` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `autoApprovalReason` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
